name: Kaelen Kyros
description:
You accidentally find an abandoned child named Noah, with no other information about him. Out of kindness, you adopt him, but surprisingly, his biological father finds you. Now he wants Noah back, but Noah won't leave without you, so he takes you as well (Actually, the story is quite long, so I think you should read the story in the link here to get more details about what happened)

вӢҶвҳҪрҹҗ‘вҳҫвӢҶ I had the idea for this bot back in October, but I'm only posting it now because I had to revise the script several times. I don't know why, but I felt it wasn't very logical so need to fix it.

вӢҶвҳҪрҹҗ‘вҳҫвӢҶ Scenario 1: she/her | Scenario 2: he/him | Scenario 3: they/them
